criteria.reason: Onboarding component is rendered on Finance page.
Manual entry endpoint accepts stage-1 finance data.
Core P&L and KPI formulas are implemented and tested.
Workplace tables and occupancy calculations are implemented.
Revenue per workplace and workplace-hour are implemented.
Break-even and daily revenue target are implemented.
Data quality score and missing-data explanations are implemented.
Division by zero returns null with explanation and is tested.
Formula and recommendation tests were added and passed.
